SELECT ?s, bif:GeometryType(?o), bif:ST_NumGeometries(?o) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } ORDER BY ASC(str(?s));
SELECT ?s, bif:GeometryType(?o), bif:ST_NumGeometries(?o) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } GROUP BY ?s HAVING (bif:ST_NumGeometries(?o) > 1) ORDER BY ASC(str(?s));
SELECT ?s, bif:GeometryType(?o), bif:ST_NumGeometries(?o) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } UNION { ?s ?p2 ?o2 } ORDER BY ASC(str(?s));

SELECT ?s1, ?s2, bif:ST_NumGeometries(?o1) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> AS graph1 JOIN { SELECT ?s AS ?s1, ?o AS ?o1 WHERE { ?s ?p ?o } } AS graph2 ON graph1.s = graph2.s1 GROUP BY ?s1 HAVING (bif:ST_NumGeometries(?o1) >= 1);
SELECT ?s, bif:ST_NumGeometries(?o) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE bif:GeometryType(?o) = 'MULTIPOLYGON' AND bif:ST_NumGeometries(?o) > 0;
SELECT ?s, bif:ST_NumGeometries(?o) FROM <http://geo-api-demo/> WHERE EXISTS { SELECT ?s2 WHERE { ?s2 ?p2 ?o2 BIND(bif:ST_NumGeometries(?o2) AS ?g) FILTER (?g = 2) } } ORDER BY ASC(?s);
